title: Koha Item
description: A catalog item record from the Taylor's Library Koha REST API.

biblio_id.description: Internal identifier for the parent bibliographic record

holding_library_id.description: Library currently in possession of the item

item_type_id.description: Itemtype defining the type for this item

collection_code.description: Authorized value for the collection code

location.description: Authorized value for the shelving location

acquisition_date.description: The date the item was acquired

checkouts_count.description: Number of times this item has been checked out

holds_count.description: Number of times this item has been placed on hold

renewals_count.description: Number of times this item has been renewed

not_for_loan_status.description: Authorized value defining why this item is not for loan

last_seen_date.description: The date the item barcode was last scanned

timestamp.description: Date and time this item was last altered
